titleStmt.title: SII 23.111: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 111. (A.R. No. 111 of 1907.) Kalliḍaikkuṟichchi, Ambasamudram Taluk, Tirunelveli District Kīri-Kṛishṇaṉ temple—on the north wall of the central shrine

summary.p: This is dated in the 3+7th year, also expressed as the 3rd year and 2594th day, of Pāṇḍya Kulaśēkharadēva introduced with the title Tribhuvanachakravarti Kōnērinmaikoṇḍāṉ. It records the remission of all taxes, by order of the king at the request of one Mānābharaṇamaṅgalattu Nambi, on 4 mā of land at Puṉāl alias Kshatriyaśikhāmaṇipuram which had been in the enjoyment of the temple of Nālāyira-Viṇṇagarāḻvār as tax-paying tirunāmattukkāṇi. The uḷvari and the royal order (keḻvi) were accordingly communicated to the temple executives permitting them to get the deed engraved on stone and copper. The identity of the king is not clear.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvaṉaccakravartti koṉeriṉmai koṇṭāṉ muḷḷi nāṭṭu brahmadeya
m śrī rājarājaccaturvedimaṅkalattut teṉpiṭākai kallaṭaikkuṟicci nā
lāyiraviṇṇakarāḻvār(r) koyilil śrīvayiṣṇavarkaḷukkum nampu ceyvā ṉukkum I
vāḻvāṟkut tiruppaṭimāṟṟuḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭum nivantaṅkaḷukku In nāṭṭup puṉā
lāṉa kṣatriyaśikhāmaṇipurattu nakarappaṟṟil Innāyaṉār tirunāmat tāl Iṟaiyoṟ
ṟi koṇṭu Aṉubhavittuvarukiṟa Ūṟṟukkuḻi viḷākattuk kāḷaiyār paḷḷam nila
m nālumāviṟ kaṭamaiyum variyum taruvatāṉa Accum kāriyavāraycciyum ve
ṭṭipāṭṭamum pañcupili cantivigrahappeṟum poṉvariyum maṟṟu me
ppeṟpaṭṭiṉavum Uṭpaṭa śrī kulaicekaradevaṟku yāṇṭu muṉṟāvati ṉeti
reḻāvatumutal tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṭappeṟaveṇumeṉṟu maāṉā paraṇa
maṅkalattu nampi namakku coṉṉamaiyil Ivvāḻvārkku tiruppaṭi māṟṟuḷḷiṭṭu
veṇṭum nivantaṅkaḷukku Innāṭṭup puṉālāṉa kṣatriyaśikhāmaṇi purattu nakarappaṟṟil
I nāyaṉār tirunāmattāl Iṟaiyoṟṟi koṇṭu Aṉubhavittu varukiṟa Ūṟṟukkuḻi vi
ḷākattuk kāḷaiyārpaḷḷam nila nālumāvil kaṭamaiyum variyum taruva tāṉa Accum kāriya
vārāṭciyum veṭṭi pāṭṭamum pañcipili cantivigrahappeṟu poṉ variyum maṟṟu
(mep)meppeṟpaṭṭiṉavum Uṭpaṭa śrīkulaicekaradevaṟku yāṇṭu muṉṟāva tiṉ Etir Eḻā
vatumutal tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṭṭu variyilār Eḻuttiṭṭa Uḷ variyum naṅ
keḻviyum taraccoṉṉom Ippaṭi candrādityavaṟ celvatākac kalliluñ cempilum ve
ṭṭivittukkoḷka Ivai cevvirukkaināṭṭuk kaḷattāvūr tiruvirā micuramuṭai
yāṉ Āṭkoṇṭavilliyāṉa kacciyarāyaṉ Eḻuttu . yāṇṭu muṉṟā vatu nāḷ Iraṇṭāyi
rattu Añnūṟṟut toṇṇūṟṟu nāliṉāl Ivai maturotayavaḷa nāṭṭuk kāñai Iruk
kai Uḻakkuṭi muttaṉ Āṭkoṇṭa villiyāṉa pallavarājaṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 23.111 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
